violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Case of bagged peppers/onions and case of sausage stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket found at 200ppm chlorine with soap added to the solution.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Deli express sandwiches had pull date of 09/27. *COS-removed from shelf while on-site.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Egg mix in refrigerator dated 09/14. *Stated as mis-dated and had been placed into refrigerator yesterday.
Contaminated food disposition. — --Hot hold taquito had make time stamp of 4:58 am and was still in case at 10am.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Gaskets at 2 door stainless refrigerator are cracked. -Gasket and door shelf are cracked through at door of upright refrigerator at make line.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Pink/debris at ice chutes of both soda machines.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Splatter at upper interior of both microwaves in the kitchen. -Dust build up at box fan near kitchen entrance. -Black/slimy debris at front edge of slush machine. -Some residue at storage cabinet handles.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris/slime at floor drain near soda bibs. -Debris build up below soda bibs.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Kitchen backroom area floors appear to need resealed/painted.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
